'''jadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabiha|zabiha]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabiha|zabiha]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jadaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jædækæth|jædækæth]] || [[word:jædækæj|jædækæj]] || [[word:jædækæsh|jædækæsh]] || [[word:jædækæ|jædækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jadadakath|jadadakath]] || [[word:jadadakaj|jadadakaj]] || [[word:jadadakash|jadadakash]] || [[word:jadadaka|jadadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jadakath|jadakath]] || [[word:jadakaj|jadakaj]] || [[word:jadakash|jadakash]] || [[word:jadaka|jadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jadafkath|jadafkath]] || [[word:jadafkaj|jadafkaj]] || [[word:jadafkash|jadafkash]] || [[word:jadafkaf|jadafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jadakatha|jadakatha]] || [[word:jadakaja|jadakaja]] || [[word:jadakasha|jadakasha]] || [[word:jadakaka|jadakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jadakath|jadakath]] || [[word:jadakaj|jadakaj]] || [[word:jadakash|jadakash]] || [[word:jadaka|jadaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jadakathal|jadakathal]] || [[word:jadakajal|jadakajal]] || [[word:jadakashal|jadakashal]] || [[word:jadakakal|jadakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jadakathatha|jadakathatha]] || [[word:jadakajaja|jadakajaja]] || [[word:jadakashasha|jadakashasha]] || [[word:jadakaka|jadakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jadakathan|jadakathan]] || [[word:jadakajan|jadakajan]] || [[word:jadakashan|jadakashan]] || [[word:jadakakan|jadakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jadakathaoro|jadakathaoro]] || [[word:jadakajaoro|jadakajaoro]] || [[word:jadakashaoro|jadakashaoro]] || [[word:jadakakaoro|jadakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
